parts.text:
table SalesFact
	column Amount
		dataType: double
	column Margin = SalesFact[Amount] * 0.1
	partition SalesFact = m
		mode: import
		source = let Source = Web.Contents("https://example.invalid/data") in Source

table SalesFact
	column Amount
		dataType: double
	partition SalesFact = entity
		mode: import
		entityName: SalesFact
		source = Lakehouse.Contents([])

table SalesFact
	column Amount
		dataType: double
	partition SalesFact = entity
		mode: directLake
		entityName: SalesFact
